demos.title: 🔴 Critical: Building Collapse (Earthquake)
demos.description: Severe crush injury with bleeding and respiratory distress
demos.scenario: Urban disaster - patient requires immediate trauma surgery

demos.title: 🟡 Moderate: Respiratory Illness (Refugee Camp)
demos.description: Fever, cough, and malnutrition in crowded displacement setting
demos.scenario: Humanitarian setting - patient needs clinical assessment + isolation

demos.title: 🟢 Low: Recovery Support (Community Center)
demos.description: Minor injuries, basic needs, psychosocial support
demos.scenario: Post-emergency phase - patient transitioning to recovery services
